title: Blue Totem of Undying [v1]
description: A lightweight texturepack that brings a stylish blue theme to the totem of undying
body:
We all love totems of undying don't we? They already have an amazing texture but you know what, more color never hurts!
This texturepack, part of the Colored Totems Collection, changes the texture of the totem of undying giving it an amazing blue theme. It's that simple!
